title: review: rate-limiter divergence
body:
## Problem

Location: apps/web-platform/server/rate-limiter.ts:152-191 — both extractors diverge.

Also: server/ws-handler.ts uses the shallower helper.

## Proposed Fix

Consolidate.

title: review: api-usage client aggregation
body:
## Problem

apps/web-platform/server/api-usage.ts:40 does client-side sum. See apps/web-platform/server/api-usage.ts:55 too.

Related: server/api-usage.ts other callers, knowledge-base/project/plans/x.md.

## Proposed Fix

Postgres aggregate.

title: review: log sanitize dedupe
body:
## Problem

apps/web-platform/lib/log-sanitize.ts dupes apps/web-platform/lib/auth/validate-origin.ts logic.

Shorthand: lib/log-sanitize.ts, lib/auth/validate-origin.ts.

## Proposed Fix

Shared helper.
